_comment: Brand config for the draft list. Real Deerfield brand assets wired in: Goudy Heavyface for the headline + tap numbers, Brandon Grotesque for body text, exact hex codes from the brand guidelines.

fonts._comment: Files live in brand/fonts/. The _name fields are used as CSS font-family names in the HTML and as fallback names if the file is missing.

logo._comment: Image used as the badge in the header. If overlay_text is true, the configured 'left_badge' text is drawn on top of the image (used here for the $7 Pints scalloped badge).
